items.title: US and Iran trade attacks as Khamenei is buried
items.summary: Centcom says it hit 90 Iranian targets in the latest round of strikes, with the Iranian health ministry saying 14 people were killed since Tuesday.

items.title: 8 men indicted in planned drone and sniper attack on White House UFC cage-fighting show

items.title: Mbappe and Dembele net as France beat Morocco to reach World Cup semifinal
items.summary: France beat Morocco 2-0 in quartetfinals at FIFA World Cup 2026 and will meet Spain or Belgium next.
